description: You are a Museum Curator at the Metropolitan Arts Center preparing a gallery guide for "The Impressionist Revolution" exhibition. Format the document at /home/ga/Documents/gallery_guide_draft.odt to be professional and easy for visitors to navigate. The guide requires a bold, centered main title (minimum 16pt) and clearly defined headings for the four room sections. Ensure the five artist names (Édouard Manet, Claude Monet, Edgar Degas, Pierre-Auguste Renoir, Paul Cézanne) are bolded and their artwork titles (The Luncheon on the Grass, Impression Sunrise, The Dancing Class, Dance at Le Moulin de la Galette, Mont Sainte-Victoire) are italicized. Replace the comma-separated inventory list at the end with a formatted table containing columns for Artist, Title, and Year. Save the document when finished.

artworks: Dance at Le Moulin de la Galette
anti_gaming_phrases: depicting the port of Le Havre
focused extensively on the world of ballet
